title: Ethereum’s Descending Broadening Wedge Signals a Potential Breakout Past $4K
author: tickeron_community
selftext: As of May 21, 2025, Ethereum ([ETH](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETH.X/)) is capturing the attention of traders and analysts alike, with its 3-day chart forming a [Descending Broadening Wedge pattern](https://tickeron.com/crypto-pattern-screener/)—a classic technical setup that often precedes significant price [movements.As](http://movements.As) of May 21, 2025, Ethereum ([ETH](https://tickeron.com/ticker/ETH.X/)) is capturing the attention of traders and analysts alike, with its 3-day chart forming a [Descending Broadening Wedge pattern](https://tickeron.com/crypto-pattern-screener/)—a classic technical setup that often precedes significant price movements.

comments.author: Sunny88280
comments.body: This is a very good bullish chart! Now ETH has broken through the descending wedge pattern and is constantly moving upward from the bottom! Let‘s take advantage of the zero fee trading on MEXC to add more to the bag before it breaks through $4K.
